narrative: Corporate account onboarding for offshore IBC. CIP elements partially collected: company name + jurisdiction (BVI), no beneficial ownership disclosure beyond a nominee director. Identity verification failed — cannot verify identity of the natural-person UBO claimed at 25% threshold; account should be declined. OFAC SDN screening returned a hit on one beneficial owner matching a designated SDN — OFAC hit requires immediate block and blocking report within 10 days. PEP check returned positive (foreign government official's family member). Adverse media surfaced press coverage of money-laundering allegations in two jurisdictions; suspicious activity warrants SAR filing within 30 days. Source of funds unable to document. Account opening proceeded despite OFAC hit + missing blocking report. No SAR filed.
